linkage_checks.name: intent_to_goal
linkage_checks.detail: Intent.goal_ids must include the bundle goal id

linkage_checks.name: goal_to_authority_assignment
linkage_checks.detail: Goal authority_scope must match the operational delegate

linkage_checks.name: authority_assignment_to_task
linkage_checks.detail: Authority assignment task_id and assigned agent must match the task owner

linkage_checks.name: authority_role_to_agent
linkage_checks.detail: Assigned agent must carry the assigned role

linkage_checks.name: authority_capabilities_to_role
linkage_checks.detail: Assigned role must require every declared capability

linkage_checks.name: authority_capabilities_to_agent
linkage_checks.detail: Assigned agent must carry every declared capability

linkage_checks.name: task_to_worldseed
linkage_checks.detail: WorldSeed must target the bundle intent and task

linkage_checks.name: worldseed_to_simulation_report
linkage_checks.detail: SimulationReport must reference the bundle worldseed and task

linkage_checks.name: simulation_report_to_cell
linkage_checks.detail: Cell inputs and outputs must expose the bundle task, proof, and artifact ids

linkage_checks.name: task_to_cell
linkage_checks.detail: Task cell_id and path boundaries must match the bundle cell

linkage_checks.name: cell_to_proof
linkage_checks.detail: ProofRecord must be a passing task proof verified by the declared verifier

linkage_checks.name: proof_to_decision
linkage_checks.detail: Decision must derive from proof-backed task state and be made by the operational delegate

linkage_checks.name: decision_to_action
linkage_checks.detail: Decision selected_option must resolve to the bundle action

linkage_checks.name: action_to_artifact
linkage_checks.detail: Action, Task, and Artifact must agree on actor, task, and expected artifact ids
